title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion is an open-source AI image model by Nvidia optimized for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates its capabilities, workflow integration with ComfyUI, and comparisons with alternatives like SeedVR2 and Z-image.
